content.text: Hey there! 👋 What's up? I'm Niggy2, your friendly AI assistant. How can I help you out today?

content.text:
Why do programmers prefer dark mode?

Because light attracts bugs! 🐛

Ha! Get it? Because in programming, a "bug" is an error in the code, and... okay, maybe that one's a bit nerdy. 🤓

Want another one?
